description: A customer needs to update their credit card on file because the old one has expired.

nodes.task_description: Generate a secure link for the customer to update their payment details directly, without sharing card numbers with the agent.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a secure payment update link to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the new payment method has been successfully added to the account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the update in the billing system.
